MainPageDescription: Anarchist, libertarian action and intellectual knowledge sharing platform
whoWeAreDescription: Libertarian anarchist activism is a platform of political action and ideas that consistently stands with the oppressed in the struggle for workers’ rights and the conflict between the state and the people—even in positions deemed “extreme” in Turkey—and has, in fact, paid a price for this; it burns with the fervor to transform a rotten and antiquated system of oppression through optimistic radicalism.
ourGoalDescription: Libertarian Anarchist Foundation is a consistent and principled platform for action and ideas, organized in opposition to the top-down, liberal-libertarian platforms in Turkey that stifle the libertarian youth and systematically operate with anti-libertarian agendas. LAF, established by a completely independent youth movement of free-thinking advocates who have grown weary of the corrupt liberal politics in Turkey that seeks to buy off and pacify through external funding—and who have adopted the motto that this can and must be reorganized—began through the ideological reformation and realignment of its predecessor, 'Liberteryen Gençlik'; Its enduring lifeblood has always been an unwavering opposition to extremism, radicalism, political realism, and opportunism. LAF’s fundamental mission is to introduce libertarian thought—which is needed in Turkey and resonates deeply with youth—to broad segments of the public within a politically realistic framework, and to at least address the genuine concerns of a working-class segment that has little to lose but much to gain, while fostering a broader class consciousness.
whyAnarchoCapitalismDescription: For millennia, it has manifested itself through enslavement, humiliation, dehumanization, degeneration, and mass slaughter; the institutional mechanisms of oppression and inefficiency created by the state—a monopoly on violence that has produced poverty and misery for the masses, as well as obedience and immorality within political power structures—and which rejects these hierarchies and sociocultural decay, advocating instead that an alternative is not only possible but necessary; if anarcho-capitalism, if an ideology that offers such a profound perspective and a multifaceted understanding of humanity’s existence, civilization, and future is insufficient to define our position in the class struggle, it is questionable what else could fulfill this function.
contactDescription: To reach us: via our Telegram channel.

help.title: Help - LAF
help.description: Help center and frequently asked questions

register.question: I would like to participate in the LAF.
register.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Login; click the underlined 'Register' link at the bottom of the page; fill in your unchangeable username and password appropriately; fill in optional but helpful information like phone number and city so we can reach you; Click 'I understand' on the warning; scratch the silver rectangle; copy the words that appear to a secure password manager's notes or carefully write them down on paper (you'll need them later); proceed to the next step (if you go back, the words will reset) and enter the words in the correct order; verify; you are now a member.

login.question: How do I log in to the site?
login.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Login; fill in the information; click Login; enter your BIP-39 words with spaces between them and without numbers; verify; login successful.

forgotPassword.question: I forgot my password?
forgotPassword.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Login; click the yellow 'Forgot your password?' link; enter your username; continue; verify your mnemonic word sequence with spaces and without numbers; enter and confirm your new password; your password has been reset.

resetPasswordWhileLoggedIn.question: Reset password while logged in
resetPasswordWhileLoggedIn.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Settings; open My Passwords; enter your current password, enter and confirm your new password; change your password.

lostMnemonic.question: I logged in but lost my BIP-39 words.
lostMnemonic.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Settings; open My Passwords; click Show BIP-39 Sequence. If it hasn't been cleared from your browser's memory, it will be displayed.

compromisedMnemonic.question: I saved my BIP-39 words in a risky place.
compromisedMnemonic.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Settings; open My Passwords; click Regenerate BIP-39 Sequence; verify your password and BIP-39 words; your new words will be displayed. Save them in a secure place or print them.

contact.question: How do I reach you through the site?
contact.answer: Click the logo to go to the homepage; scroll down to the Contact Us section and fill out the form.

platformLinks.question: Where are your other platform links?
platformLinks.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Links.

deleteAccount.question: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Settings; open the settings tab; click Delete My Account; verify your password and BIP39 words; your account is now hidden and banned; it will be completely deleted after 48 hours for security reasons.

accountBanned.question: It says your account is banned?
accountBanned.answer: Your account may have been deleted. If you didn't do it, contact us on Telegram.

writeArticle.question: How do I write an article?
writeArticle.answer: Click the Articles link in the top center; click the Write button; write your article; fill in information like thumbnail, tags, etc. and click the publish button; your article will be published after approval.

addTranslation.question: How do I add a translation?
addTranslation.answer: Open the relevant article; click the three dots; click Translate and add your translation on the opened page and publish; it will be published after approval by the author.

donate.question: How do I make a donation?
donate.answer: Download one of the official Monero wallets; set up your wallet, buy Monero through Trocador or other methods; on our site, click the 3 lines in the top right; open the Donations link; copy the wallet address or open it in your wallet with the other button; make sure your wallet has verified all nodes; enter the amount and send; after your transaction is confirmed, copy your transaction TXID; return to the site; click I Donated; fill in the TXID and other sections; send; when approved, it will be published and you'll receive a badge.

joinEvents.question: How do I join events?
joinEvents.answer: Click the Activities link in the top center; find and join the event in the events section on the opened page; if you can't find it, select your city or change the filters.

findAnarchists.question: How do I find anarchists in my city?
findAnarchists.answer: Click the Activities link in the top center; select your city; click Show Users in the top right of the map.

accessDesigns.question: How do I access designs?
accessDesigns.answer: Click the 3 lines in the top right; click Links; click the Design Files link box on the opened page; you can download all relevant designs from the opened page.

donations.title: Donation
donations.description: Due to LAF’s vehement rejection of funding and financial support from any external sources, it has no steady source of income and sustains itself through small donations from ordinary volunteers. Therefore, if you wish to contribute to independent libertarian ideas and action

EnterTheMnemonicWord: Enter your word from your BIP-39 sequence to complete the process.

login.subtitle: Sign in with your username or email and password.
login.mnemonicExample: Example: abandon ability able about above absent absorb abstract absurd abuse access accuse
login.mnemonicInstruction: Enter your 12 words with single spaces between them, without numbering.
login.mnemonicQuestionP2: th word of your recovery passphrase?

register.subtitle: Fill the form; optional fields can be left blank.
register.mnemonicSubtitle: Scratch below and write down the generated mnemonic.
register.mnemonicInfo: According to Bitcoin Improvement Proposal 39, it creates a memorable sequence of words chosen from a 2048-word list. The order of these words forms a unique secret. Keep it safe; if lost, it cannot be recovered.
register.mnemonicInfo1: This sequence is required to recover your account or change your information.
register.mnemonicInfo2: For your account's security, it will not be shown again.
register.mnemonicInfo3: After re-login, your data will be stored in your browser's local storage, you can see it in the settings dialog.
register.mnemonicWarning2: In the next step, you will be asked to enter these words in the correct order.
register.mnemonicWarning3: These words are required to access your account and cannot be recovered if lost.
register.verifyOrderSubtitle: Click the words below in the correct order to verify.
